falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme overbought conditions, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal by suggesting a potential top rather than a continuation of the bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 3% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant breakout above this key trendline would contradict the current pattern's assumption of a bottoming phase, proving the 'UNKNOWN' verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 50%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop below 50% similarity would indicate the current market is no longer aligned with the historical bottom pattern, falsifying the basis of the current call.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
